name: vcholerae_o1_SXT_ICE_reference
description: SXT/R391 ICE family — ~100 kb integrative conjugative elements first described in V. cholerae O139 MO10 (1992 Indian outbreak). Carries sulfamethoxazole/trimethoprim/streptomycin resistance (sul2, dfrA1, strAB, floR). Reference card; not endogenous to N16961 but found in many post-1990 V. cholerae isolates.
